name: CubeSandbox — Execute Code
description: Run code in an isolated CubeSandbox VM. Provides kernel-level isolation via KVM/RustVMM. Drop-in replacement for E2B sandboxes. Requires CubeSandbox server running and e2b_code_interpreter installed.

E2B_API_URL.description: URL of the CubeSandbox API gateway (e.g. http://localhost:3000 or your server address)

CUBE_TEMPLATE_ID.description: CubeSandbox template ID to use for the VM image

code.description: Code to execute inside the sandbox

executor_template.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
code = args.get('code', '')
timeout = args.get('timeout', 30)
if not code:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': 'code is required'})); sys.exit(0)
os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = '${E2B_API_URL}'
os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = '${E2B_API_KEY}'
try:
    from e2b_code_interpreter import Sandbox
    sbx = Sandbox(template='${CUBE_TEMPLATE_ID}', timeout=timeout)
    execution = sbx.run_code(code)
    sbx.kill()
    output = ''.join(str(r) for r in execution.results) if execution.results else ''
    logs = execution.logs.stdout + execution.logs.stderr if hasattr(execution, 'logs') else []
    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'output': output, 'logs': logs, 'error': execution.error if hasattr(execution, 'error') else None}))
except ImportError:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': 'e2b_code_interpreter not installed. Run: pip install e2b-code-interpreter'}))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}))
"
